pages.raw_text:
SEATTLE, Oct. 25-Negotiations
have been practically concluded for
the sale OF the plant of the Tacoma
Mill Co. on the old Tacoma water
front at a figure said to approx
mate $1,500,000, to the Port Town.
send Southern railroad a subsidiary
corporation of the Northern Pacific.


For IS months the Northern Pa.
cific has been purchasing rights of
way for the new route of entrance
into Tacoma, connecting with its
present line at Tenino, on the
PortlandTacoma route. From Te-
nino the line heads for the Mar
rows, on Puget Sound, crossing the
Nisqually river. Skirting the shore
of the Sound, the road continues
until Point Defiance is reached.
and a tunnel of this promontory,
three quarters Of mile in length,
brings the main line of the rail.
road to the Tacoma waterfront.
